introSection: Siren's Curse is a steel roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. It is a Vekoma Tilt Coaster model and is the fastest, longest, and tallest Tilt Coaster in America.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Siren's Curse was announced for Cedar Point on September 19, 2024.

Siren's Curse opened on June 28, 2025.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: After leaving the station, the ride ascends in the air, before turning onto the tilt track. Riders then come to a stop, before the track tilts 90 degrees, facing riders with the ground below. Then, the ride drops down to the ground, where riders twist through the ride's several airtime hills and inversions.

fullText:
Siren's Curse is a steel roller coaster located at Cedar Point in Sandusky, Ohio, USA. It is a Vekoma Tilt Coaster model and is the fastest, longest, and tallest Tilt Coaster in America.

Siren's Curse was announced for Cedar Point on September 19, 2024.

Siren's Curse opened on June 28, 2025.

After leaving the station, the ride ascends in the air, before turning onto the tilt track. Riders then come to a stop, before the track tilts 90 degrees, facing riders with the ground below. Then, the ride drops down to the ground, where riders twist through the ride's several airtime hills and inversions.
